creator: 1161.Cadillac.Court@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Sirs, HighPoint Technologies, would like to be listed in your hardware vendors list. HighPoint SATA RAID Controller products have native support in FreeBSD 6.3 and 7.0 

HighPoint specializes in providing SATA RAID solutions which includes a Enterprise Series, Value Line Series and Upgrade Series of RAID controllers. At "One Size Does Not Fit All" is our motto.

Fix: 

Please post HighPoint Technologies in your Hardware Vendor section of your website.
